Manual de contas e Keys e APIs

1) Billing Account

Acesse Billing e selecione ou crie a conta de faturamento.

2) BigQuery export (Billing)

Link direto: https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/[BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID]/export

Ative Standard usage cost. Selecione Project e Dataset (US ou EU) e salve.

3) Encontrar tabela

BigQuery Explorer: https://console.cloud.google.com/bigquery?project=[PROJECT_ID]

Expanda Projeto > Dataset > Tabela. Copie projeto.dataset.tabela.

4) Service Account

IAM & Admin > Service Accounts > Create Service Account.

5) Baixar JSON

Service Account > Keys > Add Key > Create new key > JSON.

6) IAM do projeto

IAM & Admin > IAM > Grant Access.

Role: BigQuery Job User.

7) Permissao no dataset

BigQuery > Dataset > Share > Manage permissions.

Role: BigQuery Data Viewer.

8) APIs (habilitar)

BigQuery API: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/bigquery.googleapis.com?project=[PROJECT_ID]

Cloud Billing API: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/cloudbilling.googleapis.com?project=[PROJECT_ID]

Generative Language API: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/generativelanguage.googleapis.com?project=[PROJECT_ID]

9) Projeto local

Coloque o JSON na raiz. No proxy, defina a tabela em BILLING_TABLE. Reinicie node server.js.
